headline: APD Exits LCEC Project, Finalizes NEOM Green Hydrogen Deal With Yara
summary: APD is exiting the LCEC project and other clean energy plans, while advancing a Yara deal to market renewable ammonia worldwide.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Albemarle (ALB) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Albemarle (ALB). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: ArcelorMittal Begins Second Tranche of 2025-2030 Buyback Program
summary: MT begins the second tranche of its 2025-2030 share buyback after completing the first, with plans to repurchase up to 10 million more shares.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Albemarle, Lowers Price Target to $185
summary: Mizuho  analyst John Roberts   maintains Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $205 to $185.
